svg.text: ro11y v0.5.1 Performance Baseline — arm64-darwin / Apple M-series
CPU Budget at 3000 req/s (% of one core)
Weighted average overhead per request: 4.42 us
catalog_browse 4.0 us weight=40% desc=GET /products: 1 span (10 attrs), 1 log (6 fields), 4 metric ops (5 dims each), 1 histogram
search 3.7 us weight=10% desc=GET /search: 1 span (10 attrs), 1 log (7 fields), 3 counters (4-5 dims), 1 histogram (4 dims)
product_detail 3.7 us weight=20% desc=GET /products/:id: 1 span (10 attrs), 1 log (6 fields), 2 counters (5 dims), 1 histogram (4 dims)
cart_add 4.7 us weight=18% desc=POST /cart/add: 1 span (11 attrs), 2 logs (6+4 fields), 3 counters (3-5 dims), 1 histogram, 1 body size histogram
checkout 10.2 us weight=8% desc=POST /checkout: 4 spans (11+3+2+2 attrs), 4 logs (8+6+4+3 fields), 5 counters (3-4 dims), 2 histograms, 1 revenue counter
health 1.3 us weight=4% desc=GET /health: 1 span (6 attrs), no logs, no metrics
